sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53338" key="karido/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾱριδόω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">καρίς</etym>) <sense id="n53338.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wriggle, twist about like a shrimp</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0405.tlg001:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxandr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">37</biblScope></bibl>. [<pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">ῑ</pron> prob.]</sense> </entryFree>
